description: The Lo Presti 'ndrina is a Mafia clan of the 'Ndrangheta, originating from Marina di Gioiosa Jonica in Calabria and established in Bardonecchia, Piedmont, in the late 1950s. Initially part of the Mazzaferro family, it became an independent 'ndrina. It is known for infiltration of public administration, leading to the dissolution of the Bardonecchia city council in 1995. The clan has been involved in drug and arms trafficking, extortion, and usury.
